steps.chooseText: Buy or rent individual content or collections
steps.accessText: Stream or download — it's yours to keep

how.customerLead: Kiibee was founded in 2017 to make it easier for creators and businesses to sell and distribute digital content directly to their audience.
how.customerBody: We saw great content being shared for free or locked behind complicated systems — and consumers struggling to access quality content in a simple way. Kiibee was built to change that.

marquee.defaultDescription: The online courses at Kammas Kantine are for those who want to learn how to take better care of their body. You'll gain knowledge about health, practical tips and tricks, and access to fantastic recipes that are simple to prepare in your own kitchen.

marketing.title: We help you market your content
marketing.description: Kiibee is not just a hosting platform - it helps you actively promote and grow your content. You can easily integrate your own sales site or shop into your existing setup, while also gaining extra exposure through Kiibee's portal, newsletters, and social media channels.
list: Share your content anywhere on the web

marketing.summary: Your content. Your audience. Your rules.

setup.label: Get your first product live in under

shortStory.imageAlt: Person working at a desk with monitors and a microphone
shortStory.title: A short story about Kiibee
shortStory.lead: Kiibee was founded in 2017 to make it easier for creators and businesses to sell and distribute digital content directly to their audience.
shortStory.body: We saw great content being shared for free or locked behind complicated systems - and consumers struggling to access quality content in a simple way. Kiibee was built to change that.

contentPerform.title: See how your content performs
contentPerform.intro: With Kiibee, you get clear insights into how your content is doing.
points: Get a clear overview of your revenue
contentPerform.outro: This helps you make better decisions about pricing, formats and future content.

getStarted.heading: Need help with the setup?
getStarted.sub: Setting up is simple, but we're here if you need us. Watch our tutorial videos for step-by-step guidance, or contact our support team for help with technical questions, best practices, and getting your first products live.

whyChoose.heading: Why creators choose Kiibee
leftItems: Get your own digital content website in just a few clicks
Collect content from multiple platforms (YouTube, Vimeo, Dropbox, etc.) in one place
Sell content or offer it for free
Protect content with access codes or email signups
Use your own payment module (Dankort, credit card, MobilePay)
Offer content as downloads or online streaming
Create online programs and digital courses
Take payment for live streaming events
rightItems: See statistics on views and sales
Show content on all devices — mobile, tablet and desktop
Sell multiple formats (video, PDF, ePub, MP3, audio)
Store content securely on Danish servers, fully GDPR compliant
Get tailored solutions based on your needs
Sell and show your content anywhere on the web
Create your own channel or site with curated collections

value.title: What you know is worth something

testimonial.quote: As a graphic designer, I'm always looking to expand my skills and stay inspired. Kiibe has been a game-changer for me. Its content is practical, creative, and easy to follow. I've picked up new techniques and design tips I wouldn't have found anywhere else. It's like having a mini design workshop right at my fingertips!
testimonial.author: Kamma, freelance graphic designer

securePayment.title: Secure and instant payment with MobilePay
securePayment.description: No complicated checkouts or foreign payment processors. Pay securely with MobilePay in seconds, or use Dankort and credit cards. Supporting creators has never been easier.

hero.title: Empowering creativity. Connecting people.
hero.subtitle: Kiibee is a digital platform where creators share their knowledge, passion, and stories, and where viewers can easily discover, rent, or buy inspiring content.

left.intro: Kiibee was founded in 2017 after we identified a growing gap in the digital content market.
left.marketGap: More and more high-quality digital content was being created - courses, talks, shows, training programs and educational material - but much of it was either locked behind complex technical solutions or shared for free on platforms not designed for direct sales.
left.consumerNeed: At the same time, everyday consumers wanted access to professional, niche and high-quality content, without having to navigate complicated platforms or rigid subscriptions.
left.bridge: Kiibee was created to bridge that gap.

right.mission: From the beginning, our goal has been to make it simple for creators and businesses to distribute and sell digital content directly to their audience — while making that content easy and intuitive for consumers to access.
right.evolution: Since 2017, Kiibee has evolved into a flexible platform used by a wide range of creators and organisations.

believe.title: What we believe
believe.alt: Creative professionals working on digital content

content.quality: We believe that quality content deserves a professional home.
content.creators: Creators should be able to own their work, control how it's shared, and get paid without technical complexity.
content.viewers: Viewers should be able to access content easily, pay only for what they want, and enjoy a smooth experience.

platform.title: More than a platform
platform.intro: Kiibee is not just a technical solution.
platform.description: It's a bridge between creators and their audience, built to support long-term value, sustainable content distribution and a better experience for everyone involved.

value.title: Join the Kiibee movement
value.subtitle: Whether you're a viewer looking to learn something new or a creator ready to share your passion, Kiibee is the place for you.

items.title: Free user account
items.text: Create and update your profile at any time.

items.title: Personalized recommendations
items.text: Get content suggestions based on your interests and viewing preferences.

items.title: All purchases in one place
items.text: After buying or renting, you're redirected to your purchase page. You'll also receive a receipt by email with a direct link to your content.

items.title: Watch anytime, on any device
items.text: Access your content whenever you want: stream online or download, across mobile, tablet, and desktop.

pricingPage.descriptionLine2: No hidden fees, no complicated setup, just creativity made simple.

subscriptionPage.title: Choose the right plan to get your account started

invite.invalidToken: This setup link is invalid or has expired. Please contact Kiibee if you need a new invitation.

items.question: Can I sell content with the free plan?
items.answer: Yes. The free Launch plan lets you upload and sell up to two products with no monthly cost. It’s a great way to test your idea before upgrading.

items.question: Can I change or cancel my plan?
items.answer: Absolutely. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time directly from your account settings.

items.question: Do viewers need a subscription?
items.answer: No. Your customers only pay for the content you choose to sell. They do not need their own subscription to access purchases.

singleTutorial.descriptionSecondary: Skulle videokvaliteten være grumset, kan det skyldes at din netforbindelse er dårlig. Du forbedre kvaliteten ved at trykke på tandhjulet i playeren og sætte opløsningen til 1080p i Chrome, Firefox og Microsoft Edge / Explorer browsere.

startCreating.heading: Start creating with Kiibee today
startCreating.description1: Join hundreds of creators sharing their work and growing their audience on Kiibee.
startCreating.description2: You can start for free, and upgrade when you're ready.

privacyPolicy.intro: Kiibee respects your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have when using our website and services.

collect.title: Information we collect
collect.body: We may collect account details such as name and email, payment and order details, support messages, and technical data like device type, browser, and usage activity.

use.title: How we use your information
use.body: We use your information to provide Kiibee services, process purchases, deliver support, improve product quality, and communicate important account and service updates.

share.title: How information is shared
share.body: We only share information with trusted service providers needed to run Kiibee, such as payment, hosting, and analytics partners. We do not sell personal data.

rights.title: Your rights and choices
rights.body: You can request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information, and you may contact us to ask questions about how your data is handled.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For privacy questions, contact us at support@kiibee.dk.

termsOfService.intro: These terms apply when you access or use Kiibee. By using the service, you agree to follow these terms and all applicable laws.

acceptance.title: Use of the service
acceptance.body: You may use Kiibee only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. Misuse of the platform, including fraud or unauthorized access, is prohibited.

accounts.title: Accounts and security
accounts.body: You are responsible for keeping your account credentials secure and for activity that happens under your account.

payments.title: Payments and purchases
payments.body: Paid content is subject to pricing shown at checkout. Purchases may be one-time, rental, or subscription-based depending on creator settings.

content.title: Creator content and intellectual property
content.body: Creators keep ownership of their content. You may not copy, redistribute, or reuse content unless the creator or law allows it.

liability.title: Disclaimers and liability
liability.body: Kiibee provides the service as available. To the extent permitted by law, Kiibee is not liable for indirect or consequential losses arising from use of the service.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For questions about these terms, contact us at support@kiibee.dk.
